implementation_summary: Backend requires non-empty reassignment_reason for application reassignment.
Backend persists structured reassignment audit metadata and before/after snapshots.
Backoffice reassignment modal marks reason required, shows current/new assignee, and preserves Application Review tab context.
Sensitive risk/model/config endpoints use backoffice read/write role gates.
Analyst/read-only mutation attempts return 403 and are audit logged on protected write paths.

residual_issues.description: Post-merge staging deploy, authenticated version proof, API smoke, and browser smoke are pending.
